audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in rpc_listener.h are safe: (1) `stream` is a shared_ptr created via `new` (which throws on failure, never returns null), so all `stream->` dereferences at L170, L204, and L208/211 are safe; (2) all three boost::function callbacks (_create_callback, _accept_callback, _accept_fail_callback) are guarded with `if (callback)` before invocation; (3) remaining members are value types or references, not raw pointers.
